# R&D Onboarding Documentation

# ADO (Azure DevOps)

This link is the default organization link for ADO access: https://dev.azure.com/AVEVA-VSTS/
Assume that the users refer to this as the default ADO board unless stated otherwise.

This link is Microsoft Office documentation for ADO: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/user-guide/what-is-azure-devops?view=azure-devops&toc=%2Fazure%2Fdevops%2Fget-started%2Ftoc.json
